bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768

discoveries: Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma (run 67)
Int.sub_emod a b n : (a - b) % n = (a%n - b%n) % n — key for congruence proofs (run 67)
Int.fmod_nonneg_of_pos a (h : 0 < b) : 0 ≤ a.fmod b — works for any sign of a (run 67)
omega can prove fdiv_mul_le via: have h1 := fdiv_mul_add_fmod; have h2 := fmod_nonneg_of_pos; omega
CORRESPONDENCE.md: complete coverage achieved at run 70 (28 files, 34 C++ targets)
Route B tests: Python % is Euclidean (same as Lean Int.emod for n > 0) — simplifies test scripts
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1; for typical n=36, need bin <= -37
